detail.description:
Experience a truly challenging puzzle adventure with NO TIMER and absolutely NO PAY-TO-WIN. Drop Escape: Color Match Puzzle tests your strategy, precision, and decision-making at your own pace. No countdowns, no pressure boosts, no forced purchases—just fair, clever, skill-based puzzles where your brain does the winning.

If you enjoy color puzzles, sort puzzles, drop puzzle games, marble puzzles, match games, or logic and brain-training challenges, this unique drop-and-match mechanic will push
detail.recentChanges:
We’ve made Drop Escape even better!

-Performance upgrades for smoother marble-dropping gameplay
-Minor bug fixes and colorful visual improvements
-Tuning to enhance puzzle flow and level balance
-Optimized for an even more relaxing, satisfying drop-and-match experience.
